calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2005 Continued To Mar-21-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-21-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly from Dept. 206 for terms of the settlement to be placed on the record this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: R. Edwards/D. Carter, CSR: Joann Prior.
Plaintiff: Dorothy Moore; present, sworn and examined.
Defendants: Beatrice Therese Edwards and Clinton Edwards; present, sworn and examined
No appearance by defendants Monique Edwards and Tatiana Edwards

Terms of the settlement were placed on the record as follows:
defendants to pay $500 (money order) by the 15th of April, May and June. By the 15th of June, a total of $1,500 should have been received by the plaintiff. Plaintiff to give 48 hrs. ex parte notice to defendants of plaintiff's intent to seek judgment if terms breached. Parties stipulated to enter Judgment if terms breached. Defendants have vacated premises

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES--DOROTHY MOORE PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER; BEATRICE THERESA EDWARDS, DEFENDANT IN PRO PER NOT PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN, CASE CONT'D TO COURT TRIAL FOR 3/21/05 IN RM 206.

JUDGE--OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE, CLERK PARAM NATT.(218)
